project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.LogixDb.Service.executor": "Debug", "023f2559-4d27-4bd0-b75c-e1f573990a1d.executor": "Debug", "306e4faf-75f3-49db-b83f-ba259752c159.executor": "Debug", "318f4a3c-5272-44c4-bb3a-c90e76056755.executor": "Debug", "35112c5d-7fbf-43b1-89ea-c0fc543f26f7.executor": "Debug", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/tnunnink/Documents/Projects/logixdb/src/LogixDb.sln", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "ml.llm.LLMConfigurable", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "sqlite" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.LRUPopupBuilder$1/SQL Dialect": [ "SQLite", "TSQL" ] } }

task.summary: Default task

Remove individual AOI import classes for parameter, operand, rung, and data type members in both SQL Server and SQLite implementations; consolidate logic into central import classes. Add `tag_consume_info` table with indices and mappings; update related migrations and tests. Adjust all entities id column data type to `uniqueidentifier`.
Make `Columns` property `protected override` across all mapping classes, add `tag_consume_info` and `tag_alias` tables with mappings and migrations, and fix minor typos in migrations.
Remove all SQLite import classes and associated abstractions; consolidate functionality under centralized implementations for improved maintainability.
Remove `ColumnType` enum and associated extensions; replace with native .NET `Type` usage in column mappings and database interactions for improved simplicity and consistency.

Replace `SnapshotAction` enum with `ImportOption`, refactor snapshot ingestion logic and method signatures across database implementations, add support for table inclusion/exclusion options during migrations.
Add `MigrationTag` class for tagging migrations, apply tags across all migrations, and refactor migration tests to reflect tagging changes.
Remove `ImportOptions` class and related usages; update migration project to include new folder structure.
Remove all unit tests for mapping classes, tasks, and snapshot seeding logic.
Remove `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting` package reference from `LogixDb.Service` project file to streamline dependencies.
Update user dictionary to include `uniqueidentifier` term
Update `.idea/workspace.xml` to reflect recent file restructuring and consolidate changes related to transformer classes and new database writer implementations.

Rename `tag_consume_info` and `tag_produce_info` to `tag_consumer` and `tag_producer` across mappings, migrations, transformers, tests, and related usages; fix column and table mapping inconsistencies.
Bump package dependencies across projects to latest versions.
Update tests to reflect schema changes and improve verification of indexes and column definitions.
Adjust IDE workspace settings and update `ControllerMap` to refine null handling.
Refactor `TableMap` classes to use `protected` access for `TableName` property, update snapshot methods for better filtering, and fix naming in `AoiTransformer`.
Replace `SqlConnectionInfo` and `SqlProvider` with `DbConnection` and `DbProvider` across projects, update related methods, and refine type handling in migrations and tests.
Make internal all public mappings, update tests for `Snapshot` and `MigrationTag`, refine `DbOptions`, and add table-specific migration assertions.
Remove `MigrationTagTests`, add `DbConnectionTests`, and expand `SnapshotTests` for better coverage.
Remove `Component` migration tag, update related migrations, refactor tag filtering logic, and add table-specific migration tests.

Reorganized migration versions and folders and moved to more parent/child hierarchical relationship pattern to normalize the database. Major updates to tag related tables. Updates to fluent migration helpers.

Normalize database schema by refining indexes, updating column definitions, and adding new columns (e.g., `source_hash`, `source_data`), while reorganizing migration scripts for better consistency and maintainability.
Update `SqlStatement` logic, replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo`, refine migration methods, and bump `L5Sharp` to v6.0.2.
Replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo`, refine migration scripts, update `SqlStatement` logic, and bump `L5Sharp` to v6.0.2.
Bump `L5Sharp` package version to 6.0.2 in testing project.
Rename `DbConnectionTests` to `DbConnectionInfoTests`, update tests to use `DbConnectionInfo.Parse`, and bump `L5Sharp` to v6.0.2.
Rename `DbOptions` to `TableOptions`, replace `ILogixDbTransformer` with `ISnapshotTransformer`, extend `Extensions`, update `ColumnMap` and `DbConnection` types, and refine migration logic.
Replace `ILogixDbTransformer` with `ISnapshotTransformer`, update transformer logic to improve hierarchical relationships, eliminate redundant operations, and refine metadata handling for `Snapshot`.
Rename `ILogixDbTransformer` to `ISnapshotTransformer` and `DbOptions` to `TableOptions`, and update related references.
Add `record_hash` column to `tag_comment` table, refine indexes, and enforce uniqueness on `member_id` and `tag_name`.

Rename and refine columns across migration scripts for consistency (`programatically_send_event_trigger` to `send_event_trigger`, `dimension` to `dimensions`), and add `dimensions` and `radix` columns to relevant tables.

Refine column definitions in mapping classes for consistency, update record definitions to align with hierarchical relationships, add `source_hash` and `source_data` columns, and introduce `TagMemberRecord` for detailed tag member mapping.
Add `For` overloads in `ColumnMap` for mapping `double` and `byte[]` properties, with hashable configuration options.
Bump `L5Sharp` package version to 6.0.2 in data project.
Rename `DbOptions` to `TableOptions`, replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo`, and bump `L5Sharp` to v6.0.2 in CLI project.
Replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo` in `Extensions`.

Remove legacy migration test classes (`M20260309Tests`, `M20260311Tests`, `M20260312Tests`, `M20260322Tests`) and rename existing migration test classes for consistency, updating corresponding migration logic and test assertions.

Add `GetProgram` method to `Tag` extension, refine `ColumnMap` with new overloads for `int` and `float` properties, and enhance `ControllerMap` with additional redundancy, safety, and security mappings.

Refine transformers and mappings: fix duplicate checks in `ModuleTransformer`, rename `ParentId` to `FolderId` across `ProgramMap` and `ProgramRecord`, and streamline tag handling in `TagTransformer`.
Add `GetTargetId` SQL statement to retrieve `target_id` by `target_key` and update `ImportSnapshotAsync` to use it.

Rename and refine columns across migration scripts for consistency (`controller_revision` to `revision`, `content_hash` to `record_hash`), update `source_data` columns to allow max binary size, and add `security_code` column to `controller` table.
Optimize `GetTargetId` call in `ImportSnapshotAsync` by directly parsing `Guid` from query result.
Revise migration test classes for consistency and update test assertions to reflect refined schema changes, including renamed columns, adjusted data types, and added indices.
Remove legacy migration test classes (`M20260309Tests`, `M20260311Tests`, `M20260312Tests`, `M20260322Tests`) to clean up deprecated test cases.
Replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo` across test classes for consistency and improved clarity.

Revise `SqlServerDbMigrateTests` for better clarity and consistency: rename test method, replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo`, update options (`DbOptions` to `TableOptions`), and refine test assertions.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration: adjust paths, refine highlighting settings, and reorganize recent migration and test references for improved consistency.
Remove unused `System.Data` using directive from `M202602061020CreateSnapshotTable`.
Replace `TableOptions` with `ComponentOptions`, update migration methods to simplify filtering logic, and refactor `EnsureCreatedAndMigrated` into `EnsureDatabase`.

MESSAGE.value: Bump `L5Sharp` package version to 6.0.2 in testing project.
Rename `DbConnectionTests` to `DbConnectionInfoTests`, update tests to use `DbConnectionInfo.Parse`, and bump `L5Sharp` to v6.0.2.
Rename `DbOptions` to `TableOptions`, replace `ILogixDbTransformer` with `ISnapshotTransformer`, extend `Extensions`, update `ColumnMap` and `DbConnection` types, and refine migration logic.
Replace `ILogixDbTransformer` with `ISnapshotTransformer`, update transformer logic to improve hierarchical relationships, eliminate redundant operations, and refine metadata handling for `Snapshot`.
Rename `ILogixDbTransformer` to `ISnapshotTransformer` and `DbOptions` to `TableOptions`, and update related references.
Add `record_hash` column to `tag_comment` table, refine indexes, and enforce uniqueness on `member_id` and `tag_name`.

Rename and refine columns across migration scripts for consistency (`programatically_send_event_trigger` to `send_event_trigger`, `dimension` to `dimensions`), and add `dimensions` and `radix` columns to relevant tables.

Refine column definitions in mapping classes for consistency, update record definitions to align with hierarchical relationships, add `source_hash` and `source_data` columns, and introduce `TagMemberRecord` for detailed tag member mapping.
Add `For` overloads in `ColumnMap` for mapping `double` and `byte[]` properties, with hashable configuration options.
Bump `L5Sharp` package version to 6.0.2 in data project.
Rename `DbOptions` to `TableOptions`, replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo`, and bump `L5Sharp` to v6.0.2 in CLI project.
Replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo` in `Extensions`.

Remove legacy migration test classes (`M20260309Tests`, `M20260311Tests`, `M20260312Tests`, `M20260322Tests`) and rename existing migration test classes for consistency, updating corresponding migration logic and test assertions.

Add `GetProgram` method to `Tag` extension, refine `ColumnMap` with new overloads for `int` and `float` properties, and enhance `ControllerMap` with additional redundancy, safety, and security mappings.

Refine transformers and mappings: fix duplicate checks in `ModuleTransformer`, rename `ParentId` to `FolderId` across `ProgramMap` and `ProgramRecord`, and streamline tag handling in `TagTransformer`.
Add `GetTargetId` SQL statement to retrieve `target_id` by `target_key` and update `ImportSnapshotAsync` to use it.

Rename and refine columns across migration scripts for consistency (`controller_revision` to `revision`, `content_hash` to `record_hash`), update `source_data` columns to allow max binary size, and add `security_code` column to `controller` table.
Optimize `GetTargetId` call in `ImportSnapshotAsync` by directly parsing `Guid` from query result.
Revise migration test classes for consistency and update test assertions to reflect refined schema changes, including renamed columns, adjusted data types, and added indices.
Remove legacy migration test classes (`M20260309Tests`, `M20260311Tests`, `M20260312Tests`, `M20260322Tests`) to clean up deprecated test cases.
Replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo` across test classes for consistency and improved clarity.

Revise `SqlServerDbMigrateTests` for better clarity and consistency: rename test method, replace `DbConnection` with `DbConnectionInfo`, update options (`DbOptions` to `TableOptions`), and refine test assertions.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration: adjust paths, refine highlighting settings, and reorganize recent migration and test references for improved consistency.
Remove unused `System.Data` using directive from `M202602061020CreateSnapshotTable`.
Replace `TableOptions` with `ComponentOptions`, update migration methods to simplify filtering logic, and refactor `EnsureCreatedAndMigrated` into `EnsureDatabase`.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Replace `TableOptions` with `ComponentOptions`, update migration methods to simplify filtering logic, and refactor `EnsureCreatedAndMigrated` into `EnsureDatabase`.
